title: New Balance Men's FuelCore Coast V4 Running Shoe
description:
Whether you're running at the gym or wearing on the streets, the new fuel core coast V4 unites convenience and comfort for the ultimate everyday athletic shoe. The ground contact eva outsole creates a lightweight ride while bootie construction has a second-skin feel and is easy to slip on and go.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
Laser Engraving
NB Response 2.0 Performance Insert
Bootie Construction
Synthetic/Mesh Upper

reviews.title: Love them!
reviews.text: Light weight with a great fit. Perfect for travel or day to day wear.  They handled a solid day of walking around city streets in comfort.  I’m ordering another pair in a different color.

reviews.title: Super Light weight
reviews.text: The style, color and the lightweight of the material and sole make a perfect shoe. We will see in time if they stand up to my husbands daily regime at the gym.

reviews.title: Great running and walking shoe
reviews.text: Wonderful product, fit perfectly, wash in washing machine NOT HOT WATER, warm or cold so glued parts do not come apart. They wash many, many times with no ill effects.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Comfortable, fit well, sharp looking.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 Running Shoes
description: Celebrate the retro style of the historic Japanese capital in this special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo running shoe from ASICS. This updated version combines advanced components with a striking new design that honors Tokyo's heritage. The GEL-KAYANO 26 shoe allows you to tackle long distances in comfort, thanks to the rearfoot GEL technology that's been redesigned for improved shock absorption upon impact. You'll also benefit from a bouncy feel that stems from the FLYTEFOAM Propel midsole technology. The DUOMAX technology in the midsole offers better support and helps resist excessive overpronation while I.G.S. technology promotes smoother propulsion. Additionally, this style is accented with reflective detailing to improve your visibility when running in low light settings. Get the inspiration and support you need to smash your training goals in the special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo performance running shoe from ASICS.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh

reviews.title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 doesn't work for me
reviews.text:
I really wanted to love these shoes. I bought the Black ones and they looked great. But trying them on was another thing. Under where my toes connect to my feet there is a ridge or slight raised part that I could really feel. From the ridge to the toe of the shoe my toes seemed to slightly drop making the shoe very uncomfortable for me.
I am really glad that I purchased them through Amazon the free return policy worked for me. I sent the shoes back the next morning. The credit showed up the next morning.

reviews.title: Super shoes— my 6th pair!
reviews.text: I get a new pair every year for birthday and absolutely LOVE them ! Great fit, fine look, they seem to get better every year!!!

reviews.title: Asics Kayano
reviews.text: Asics Kayano's are the best!  Lots of support in the heel, and the Duomax support system is awesome!

reviews.title: Update:Tread showing considerable wear after 70 miles
reviews.text:
Two star: Upper is holding up nicely. Tread is already worn out after only 70 miles. I tried ASICS because reviews talk of superior durability. So far for me upper is good, sole is not.

Update: I reached out to ASICS about the tread life. After sending pictures of tread wear after 70 miles they sent code for replacement shoe from ASICS.com.
That’s pretty awesome customer service in my book.

So far 20 miles on new Kayano fit and finish is great.

Comfort on gel-Kayano 28 is far superior to previous models.

Extra wide is a touch narrow but all in all the first 20 miles is running great.

reviews.title: He’ll only wear ASICS
reviews.text: My husband buys one pair of shoes a year (imagine that!). Of course, he wears them every single day—365 days! ASICS are the best fit and most comfortable for him. They’re fit true to size and are just as advertised. He’s very happy!

title: ASICS Men's Dynablast Running Shoes
description: The DYNABLAST shoe is recommended for runners who want a responsive underfoot experience during their run. This running shoe comfortably wraps around the foot like a gentle hug. This design features a lightweight and breathable upper to keep feet cool without forgoing support. Additionally, the shoe's upper is made with recycled materials, while the sockliner is produced with a solution dyeing process that reduces carbon emissions and water usage. Equipped with FLYTEFOAM Blast cushioning in the midsole to generate soft landings, this material is also complemented with underfoot cutouts in the outsole to provide runners with a more responsive toe-off.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole
FLYTEFOAM BLAST: Lightweight, midsole foam with energetic and highly responsive cushioning and bounce for an efficient ride.
Knit upper:
Solid Rubber Outsole: Provides enhanced durability and traction.
Underfoot cutouts provide excellent bounce:
EVA Sockliner: Removable sockliner that provides cushioning performance.

reviews.title: Very lightweight and comfortable
reviews.text: Like color and comfort

reviews.title: Dyna and Nova both a Blast.
reviews.text: I had put 700 miles on my Novablast this year and wanted to tell you they held up great even through many runs in snow and rain. I found the Nova well cushioned,nice tongue, wide toe box, firm mid,, but  unstable on camber and turns and a touch heavy.. The dyna I recently purchased feel lighter, good heel cushion, thinner tongue and nice toe drop. I really like both models of ASIC.  Perfect for me at 36 miles a week.

reviews.title: Love the color
reviews.text: While too soft for me to use as a running shoe I do love the snazzy color and I get a lot of compliments on the looks.

title: ASICS Kid's JOLT 3 Grade School Running Shoe
description: Inspired by our GT running series, the JOLT 3 GRADE SCHOOL shoe is a multi-functional style that’s engineered for everyday use. Featuring a comfortable fit in the forefoot, this shoe is complemented with stitched down overlays to improve support in the upper. Mesh underlays help deliver better airflow to keep feet cool, while the stitched toe and solid rubber outsole increases durability to last longer.

reviews.title: More durable than most
reviews.text: My son destroys his shoes and it is so hard to find something that doesn’t get a hole the first week. I’m sure not all 10 year old boys are as rough but this style has held up well and we are now on our 3rd pair.

reviews.title: Good product.
reviews.text: Grandson loved them.  Price was very good.

reviews.title: Good quality, look nice
reviews.text:
I bought these for my 8 year old (heading into 3rd grade). They fit great and look greats he’s very happy. Time will tell how well they hold up!

We have bought ASICS for him before and they hold better than some. We usually wait until there are holes in them before buying new ones, the last ones lasted a good 6 months!

reviews.title: Great shoes
reviews.text: Well made, great looking, comfortable shoes.  Kiddo wears them to school and they are working out nicely for her during PE, recess, and after school sports.

reviews.title: Just the show I was looking for
reviews.text: Asics is my go-to shoe for exercise and everyday wear, these were no exception and completely fit the bill.

title: SRONGKE Men's Athletic Walking Shoes Outdoor Running Shoes Slip on Fashion Sock Sneaker
features: manmade sole

💨『Breathable Naked-feeling Upper』SRONGKE men's sneakers use Breathable knit uppers allow your feet to breathe and keep a dry. The Close-fitting, Sock-like feeling foot environmen is soft and comfortable.

💨『Lightweight and Non-slip』Clear lines of MD sole make this High-top sneaker soft ,non-slip and wear-resistant.The lightweight elastic sole keeps you comfortable and confidence while walking, brisk walking, jumping and running. ideal for men.

💨『Personalized shoe modeling』The sole extends to the upper like a claw, just like an octopus, with unique and beautiful shape.All year round shoes styles. Fashionable style footwear, can match any clothes.Let Her find you in the crowd at a glance.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.

title: Brooks Women's Ravenna 9 Road Running Shoe
description: Fall in love with the new Addiction 13. The BioMoGo DNA midsole provides adaptive cushioning, while the Extended Progressive Diagonal Rollbar guarantees stability and comfort. The Segmented Crash Pad allows a soft and flowing heel-toe transition. If you add to all this an extra-comfortable upper in perforated mesh for moisture transpiration, you will discover why these shoes are addictive, but without any unpleasant side effects. Features: The BioMoGo DNA midsole offers adaptive cushioning, the Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot ensures smooth transitions, the Omega Flex Grooves improve flexibility, great for running on the road, ideal for those with medium arched feet / flat, ideal for those with moderate pronation, 12 mm thick midsole. Weight 383 gr.
features: Imported
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Love these shoes
reviews.text: Very light weight and breathable. My favorite running shoes, I own several pair.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

title: ASICS Mens Gel-Venture 6 Running Shoe
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: Rubber sole
Outdoor-ready runner with mesh and brushstroke-patterned underlays
Rearfoot GEL cushioning
Removable sockliner accommodates medical orthotics
Trail-specific outsole with reversed traction lugs
AHAR outsole rubber in critical high-wear areas

reviews.title: Fit
reviews.text: Good shoe

reviews.title: Comfort
reviews.text: Second time buying this style because my son loves how comfortable they are.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: These shoes are PERFECT for walking and hiking. Comfortable and roomy toe box.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Love these Asics, 4th pair,

reviews.title: Ok shoe
reviews.text: Length is right but width is a bit tight. Should fit better after a while of wearing in. I wear a size 11 with medium width. Get 1 width bigger. Nice quality.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 8 Mid Top Running Shoes
description: The GEL-VENTURE 8 MT (Mid-Top) running shoe is designed for the great outdoors. This version offers added ankle support that makes it an excellent choice for those seeking lasting stability. This model has been updated with a more accommodating forefoot fit while reducing the number of overlays around the forefoot without sacrificing durability. Lastly, the outsole is also more durable, incorporating a traction pattern that's been improved with re-engineered lugs under the heel. All of these updates make the new GEL-VENTURE 8 MT shoe an excellent companion for your next adventure.
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

GEL Technology: Cushioning provides excellent shock absorption

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

reviews.title: Fits like a glove
reviews.text: Great shoe. Fits perfectly

reviews.title: Very Nice Quality for the Price
reviews.text: Fits perfectly.  Very easy to get on and off. So far, the soles appear to be wearing well. I walk on concrete and so far do not notice any appreciable wear.

reviews.title: True to my size, as always. Super comfy for a big guy.
reviews.text: My goodness I love these shoes. The 23’s are just my favorite. It’s nice I can get them here because a lot of times you can’t find the “older” model in the shoe store.

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: Wrong size sent/ not size I ordered.
reviews.text: Can’t wear these as they are way too small. I Like the bright painted colors- they look like fun art pieces.

reviews.title: Super Comfy
reviews.text: Very light weight with just enough arch support and super comfy.Bought a half size up since she usually needs a wide.  Bought for my daughter who works in a hospital on her feet for 8 to 10 hours at a time.

reviews.title: Lightweight
reviews.text: Great athletic shoe fit is good, so lightweight. Great looking

reviews.title: Great shoe
reviews.text: Super light weight with great support ! Hooked on these shoes !

reviews.title: LOVE THEM!
reviews.text: I am a 7 but I wear 7.5. Fits great. I like a little room. I own many Brooks running shoes and these are the best. They are light weigh, not bulky, style looks great has a shape to it. I forget I am wearing them that is how comfortably light they are. LOVE THEM. I bought two more in different colors. I used them at the gym or long walks.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Very light and comfy.

reviews.title: very comfortable
reviews.text: I love New Balance tennis shoes.  They seem to fit my feet so well.  My last pair was well worn out, so I searched on Amazon to find a new pair.  I found these and the price was so good that I ordered them.  They fit perfectly and I love them.  So cozy to wear.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, ...
reviews.text: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, hearsay- I am not sure of the exact fit. They are exchanging for a bigger size though.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

reviews.title: ... been a fan of Asics and this did not disappoint!
reviews.text: I've always been a fan of Asics and this did not disappoint!

title: AUGSUN 110pcs 3/8inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes
features: 【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】: Package includes 110 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【SIZE】: 9.52 mm (3/8 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

reviews.title: Perfect for team spike kit
reviews.text: Need lots of spikes? This is the perfect item for you. They keep sharp, install easily and the tool is comfortable to handle. We keep ours in a small Tupperware container, ready for the next meet.

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: Defective manufacturing
reviews.text: I’m this was my second pair of these shoes within 6 months but this pair is very u comfortable on the left shoe and I can’t do walks in them.  Very disappointed in it... it’s like the left shoe has a defect I it.  Unfortunately I saved the shoe for over a month before I wore it and too late to return.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and supportive. I started wearing Brooks when I got planter fasciitis. I haven’t had issues in a long time. I tried another model, but I went back to these.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.title: Don't Buy!!
reviews.text: The shoes are NOT worth 130.00 or 50.00 inserts last less than one month shoes themselves no arch support. In the end caused my feet problems.

reviews.title: Love the shoes - kind of hard to get on a toddler
reviews.text: They are adorable and a perfect fit, but due to the kind of shoe it is, it can be hard to get on a toddler's foot because they don't always hold their foot out straight!!! Can be frustrating if we're in a hurry, but certainly not a deal breaker.

reviews.title: Hard to get foot into
reviews.text:
My 5 year old son struggles to pry his foot into these since the tongue is sewn in. Shoelaces began fraying after a couple weeks also.
***Update: after only 3 months of wearing them to school, the mesh covering the toe began to tear. Such a waste of money.

title: New Balance Women's 430 V1 Running Shoe
description:
Two layers of cushioning support deliver a plush ride in the 430 women's running shoe from New Balance. Mesh on the durable leather upper breathes as your run heats up.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

title: Brooks Mens Ghost 12 Running Shoe
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported

THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Neutral runners looking for a lightweight shoe and a smooth ride without sacrificing cushioning. Whether you’re a Ghost loyalist or are lacing one up for the first time, you’ll find plenty to like.
SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The neutral support type provides high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 11
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: The newly engineered mesh and 3D Fit Print practically disappears on your foot with strategically placed stretch and structure.

reviews.title: I likes ‘em
reviews.text:
I’m not a runner so I can’t tell you what these or like for running in (though I’ve read good things about that), but I just wear them as every day, all around sneaks and they’re great for that. Great fit, cushy without making you feel like you’re going to fall over, and my previous pair of ghost 11s have held up nicely so I imagine these will too.

The instep on the shoes is just nylon mesh, so they’re anything but waterproof. They’re not even remotely water-resistant. But don’t expect that and I think you’ll probably be very happy with these shoes. Maybe not – different people’s feet are different and I’ve read a few reviews from people who aren’t thrilled with these. But for my part I’ve had a full range of shoes and sneakers over the years, some great and some not so much, and these are among the ones I’ve been happiest with. May you have a similar experience!

reviews.title: Over 900 miles, almost time for a new pair
reviews.text:
I work at a hospital, average 700+ miles a year at work, these have lasted 1.5 years but I wasn’t having to walk as much throughout Covid, things were a bit isolated in our hospital (largest university hospital in the Rocky Mountain region so we were busy but not spread out as usual).

Looking for my next pair since these are out of stock in my size.

Would love to see Brooks give health care workers a discount! But I’ll still pay since I know they are quality!

title: EZ-STIK 13.1 Half Marathon Decal Sticker 6" 5k 10k Running Shoes runnerA010
description: There is no background color. The surface that you apply the sticker to will become your background color. This will be a single color sticker. This is a DIE-CUT vinyl decal meaning that the background has been trimmed off. If there is a background color in the picture, it is used only as a representation. The background color will be the surface color you place the sticker on (or clear if you put it on a window). The decal will come with clear transfer tape, so you can easily apply it to anything you like (walls, windows, cars, mailbox, mirrors, laptops, etc etc etc). I use PREMIUM Oracal brand vinyl for all decals. Application is relatively easy. Your decal will come as THREE pieces - the backing paper, the sticker itself, and the clear transfer tape. Make sure you are applying to a CLEAN surface. You carefully pull the clear transfer tape up from the backing paper, making sure that it pulls the sticker up with it (if it does not, then firmly press down on it with a squee-gee or credit card or something similar until it sticks properly to the clear transfer tape). Then you apply the sticker and clear transfer tape to whatever surface you would like the decal on. You then use a squee-gee or credit card or something similar to firmly press down once again, making sure that the sticker STICKS, and then you carefully and slowly remove the clear transfer tape from the top, leaving behind only the sticker. I have found that on some surfaces (especially walls and wood surfaces), it helps to leave the clear transfer tape on for awhile to make sure everything is sticking well before removing it. I do not issue refunds or exchanges on vinyl decals. Please understand this before you bid. Some decals are more difficult to apply than others (especially the little ones!) - likewise, some surfaces are more difficult to apply decals to.
features: Easy to Apply
Instructions Included

7 year Premium Vinyl
